examples: However, Samuel Johnson's jamb won the day.
Many men including Jamb volunteered to help.
Yes, it's on the first floor, next to the jamb. Here's a map.
David Ross, 39, was found in the Village Express Hotel in The Jamb on 17 December.
Both wanted to be first again, stood with tails up, furry scimitars, noses touching at the door jamb.
